title: Treatment delay affects clinical severity of tuberculosis: a longitudinal cohort study.
author: Virenfeldt J Rudolf F Camara C Furtado A Gomes V Aaby P Petersen E Wejse C
content:
S-EPMC4067883 PMC4067883 Treatment delay affects clinical severity of tuberculosis: a longitudinal cohort study.

Objectives

To describe the risk factors for treatment delay and the effect of delay on the severity of tuberculosis (TB) in a prospectively followed TB cohort at the Bandim
